name: Salon Tracker Support Knowledge Base
description: Queries the Salon Tracker support knowledge base and returns structured results with optional artifact references.

inputParameters.name: query
inputParameters.description: Query about information that relates to the Salon Tracker knowledge base.

outputParameter.name: results
outputParameter.description: Structured results returned from the Salon Tracker support knowledge base.

value.name: result
value.description: A result returned from the Salon Tracker support knowledge base.

name.description: A short name describing the general result.

description.description: The detailed result returned from the knowledge base.

artifactName.description: The name of an artifact associated with the result, or null when no artifact is available.

artifactUrl.description: The URL of an artifact associated with the result, or null when no artifact is available.
